Feedback? Ideas? Complaints? Suggestions? Request for report about other area? send me a message!
This page was generated using data obtained on various dates including 2023-11-15, 2023-11-24, 2023-11-02, 2023-11-16. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
operator:wikidata and operator:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because operator:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q1613532 vs (missing) article redirects from en:Hermes Group to en:Hermes Europe
Lotto Goebels - an affected OSM element that may be improved

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for subject prefixed tags
subject:wikidata and subject:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because subject:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for network:2 prefixed tags
network:2:wikidata and network:2:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because network:2:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q15712258 vs (missing) article redirects from en:Flixbus to en:FlixBus
Erlangen Busbahnhof - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( relation(16150005)['network:2:wikidata'='Q15712258']['network:2:wikipedia'='en:Flixbus']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for network:2 prefixed tags']

JOSM Wikipedia plugin
